Container.Name: a-eye
Container.Overview: A-Eye is a self hosted AI photo intelligence tool. Uses local vision models to understand, describe, tag, rename, and search your photos. No cloud needed, everything runs on your own hardware. Features natural language photo search, quality detection for blurry or accidental shots, XMP sidecar writing compatible with Immich, Lightroom, and digiKam, and a temporary workspace for processing photos from other devices. Works as a full photo renamer, a metadata enrichment tool, or a non destructive read only catalogue. Powered by Ollama for local AI inference
Container.Requires: Requires a running Ollama instance with a vision model pulled (e.g. minicpm-v).

Config.Name: Photos Directory
Config.Description: Path to your photos directory on the host

Config.Name: Ollama Host
Config.Description: URL of the Ollama instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:11434)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users on Unraid)

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and thumbnail cache
